meta.name: 科技未来
meta.description: 深色调科技风格，霓虹蓝主色，锐利边角，代码感装饰线条，适合科技/AI/编程类内容

styles.container: max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 8px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.75 !important; word-wrap: break-word;
styles.h1: font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: #00d4ff !important; margin-top: 44px !important; margin-bottom: 28px !important; line-height: 1.35em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 16px 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,212,255,0.12) 0%, rgba(0,212,255,0.03) 100%); border-left: 4px solid #00d4ff; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.3); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h2: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #00d4ff !important; margin-top: 36px !important; margin-bottom: 24px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: 0.03em; padding-left: 14px; border-left: 3px solid #00d4ff; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,212,255,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h3: font-size: 19px; font-weight: 700; color: #00d4ff !important; margin-top: 28px !important; margin-bottom: 20px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: 0.02em; padding-left: 12px; border-left: 2px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.6); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h4: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: #00d4ff !important; margin-top: 22px !important; margin-bottom: 16px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; padding-left: 10px; border-left: 2px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.4); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h5: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #00d4ff !important; margin-top: 16px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; padding-left: 8px; border-left: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.35); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h6: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(0,212,255,0.85) !important; margin-top: 14px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; padding-left: 8px; border-left: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.25); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.p: margin: 5px 0 22px !important; line-height: 1.75em !important; text-align: start !important; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: #2c2c2c !important; word-break: break-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.strong: font-weight: 700; color: #00d4ff !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.em: font-style: italic; color: #555555 !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.strike: text-decoration: line-through; opacity: 0.55; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.u: text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: rgba(0,212,255,0.5); text-underline-offset: 3px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.a: color: #00d4ff !important; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.4); padding-bottom: 1px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.ul: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 22px; list-style-type: disc; color: #00d4ff; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.ol: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 22px; list-style-type: decimal; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.li: margin: 4px 0; line-height: 1.7 !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.liText: color: #2c2c2c; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskList: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 8px; list-style: none; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskListItem: line-height: 1.7 !important; list-style: none; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskListItemCheckbox: margin-right: 10px; width: 16px; height: 16px; vertical-align: middle; cursor: pointer; accent-color: #00d4ff;
styles.blockquote: margin: 4px 0; padding: 16px 12px 1px 12px !important; border-left: 3px solid #00d4ff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,212,255,0.06) 0%, rgba(0,212,255,0.02) 100%); border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; line-height: 1.75 !important; color: #555555 !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 14px; padding: 2px 6px; background-color: rgba(0,212,255,0.1) !important; color: #00b4d8 !important; border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.15);
styles.pre: margin: 28px 0; padding: 18px; background-color: rgba(0,212,255,0.04) !important; border-radius: 4px; overflow-x: auto; line-height: 1.6 !important; border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.15);
styles.hr: margin: 2.5rem auto; border: none; height: 1px; width: 60%; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, rgba(0,212,255,0.5), rgba(0,212,255,0.5), transparent);
styles.img: max-width: 100%; max-height: 600px !important; height: auto; display: block; margin: 28px auto; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.12); box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,212,255,0.08);
styles.table: min-width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 15px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.th: background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,212,255,0.15) 0%, rgba(0,212,255,0.06) 100%) !important; padding: 14px 18px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: #00d4ff !important; border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.2); border-top: 2px solid #00d4ff; word-break: keep-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.td: padding: 14px 18px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7; background: #ffffff !important; color: #3a3a3a !important; border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.12); word-break: keep-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.codeBlockPre: background-color: #0d1b2a; padding: 0; border-radius: 4px; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: hidden; margin: 28px 0; border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.2); box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(0,212,255,0.06);
styles.codeBlockCode: color: #e0f7fa; font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; display: block; white-space: pre; padding: 20px;
